message.content:
@startuml
title CVX-AI - Vue & Flask framework interaction

title VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)

actor "User" as user
rectangle "Website" as website
rectangle "Web Server" as webserver
rectangle "Filesystem Server" as filesystemserver
database "PC Filesystem" as pcfilesystem

participant "Website" as website_participant
participant "Web Server" as webserver_participant
participant "Filesystem Server" as filesystemserver_participant
participant "PC Filesystem" as pcfilesystem_participant

user -> website: opens
activate website
website -> webserver: initialize
note right of website: http://localhost:8080/
website -> filesystemserver: initialize
note right of website: http://localhost:8090/
filesystemserver -> pcfilesystem: read
pcfilesystem --> filesystemserver: return default directory
note right of filesystemserver: .../CVX_AI_WebUI/root/api/data/"
filesystemserver --> website: provide directories
website --> user: display Syncfusion FileManager component

deactivate website
deactivate webserver
deactivate filesystemserver
deactivate pcfilesystem

@enduml
